elements.name: slide-subtitle
elements.text: Dwarf planets, comets, asteroids, and Kuiper Belt objects preserve material from the solar system's formation.

elements.name: callout-body-Time capsules
elements.text: They are less altered by heat and geology than large planets, so they keep chemical clues.
elements.textPreview: They are less altered by heat and geology than large planets, so they keep chemical clues.

elements.name: callout-body-Dynamic leftovers
elements.text: Orbits can be nudged by giant planets, sending comets inward or scattering objects outward.
